title: Arespark Black Forged Carbon Fiber Vinyl Wrap, High Gloss Car Wrap Vinyl Film with Bubble Free Air Release Technology DIY Auto Decoration Sticker 1ft x 5ft
features: [Premium Cast Vinyl] Arespark forged carbon fiber vinyl wraps are crafted from premium material--CAST VINYL, providing superior conformability and durability for a variety of applications. Cast vinyl can easily conform to complex shapes and curves, such as vehicle wraps and textured surfaces, without wrinkling or lifting. Additionally, its thin construction also allows for excellent adhesion to substrates, ensuring long-term durability and resistance to peeling and cracking.

[Lower Tack Adhesive] low-tack adhesive is less sticky than traditional high-stick adhesive. Due to its low viscosity, no adhesive residue will be left behind when removing the car sticker, reducing the risk of damage to the car paint. This is very beneficial in keeping the body work beautiful and reducing maintenance costs. (This is not a product quality issue, the low-tack adhesive is sticky enough to be used in a variety of installation scenarios)

[Air Release Technology] Cast vinyl wrap rolls adopt air release technology ensuring a clean, bubble-free application suitable for beginners. Automotive wrap rolls have high viscosity and self-adhesive function. Self-adhesive means you can install by yourself easily without glues. Long-lasting viscosity, but no glue residue even when removed.

[Widely Applications] Protective vinyl wraps are easy to install in most narrow locations or corners. The soft and flexible nature of the vinyl wraps allows them to be easily adhered to a variety of products, such as car bodies, car interiors, car parts, cell phones, computers, furniture, panels, glass, windows and other non-porous surfaces.

[Installation Tips] Keep the surface of the items clean and free of residue before installation. Cut to the desired size, peel off the backing paper, and then use a squeegee to smooth out the any air bubbles. During the installation process, we recommend using a heat gun to heat the wraps to improve their flexibility (but please do not pull them excessively). After successful installation, please keep away from sunlight and rainwater for several days to make the car stickers have better adhesion.
